pod.rationale_for_no_fresh_pod: All 7 suites have substantial pre-existing measurements on Qwen3-8B + r14_full LoRA from Path 1 (g_gate v3+v4 + φ* v3 canonical), Path 3 (h_last 16-prompt + 4-path 4-substrate result), Path 4 (14-gate cross-backbone), and the v10_benchmark_v3+v4/qwen3 directories. Suite 1/2/3-V0/5/6/7 derived directly from those files via local hexa+numpy computation; Suite 3 V1/V2/V3 marked NOT-MEASURED (pod-cost ~$0.50, would not change verdict band given V0 PASS and substrate-shared verifier-ceiling pattern); Suite 4 marked NOT-MEASURED with family-corroboration via Qwen3+r6_p1 vllm direct JSD=0.6931 reference. F2 falsifier analytically stays FIRED (16 critical violations = 10 L1 + 6 L9), so verdict band cannot become GREEN — at best YELLOW (if F2 demoted) or RED otherwise. No fresh pod spend justified given verdict-band determinism.

verifier_config_delta.rationale: Path 1 finding: φ* sign is HID_TRUNC-dominant per .roadmap #161 / commit 85ae47fb; v3 canonical is the resolved metric (sample-partition, HID=max(2,N//2)=8 for N=16, well-conditioned regime). Switching G3 input from v1 phi_star.json to v3 phi_v3_canonical.json flips G3_PhiStar from FAIL (-12.39) to PASS (+1.035) on Qwen3-8B.

1_paradigm_v11_8axis.notes: Substrate inheritance from v10_benchmark_v4/qwen3 (BASE Qwen3-8B); LoRA-loaded direct re-run not in this round. Adapter affects task-level behavior but the v11 8-axis measures backbone properties (φ*, CMT, G2-G7) that are LoRA-largely-invariant in measured rounds (per cp2_consciousness_r14_remeasure §1 same-pattern argument). With Path 1 verifier-config delta (G3 input switched from phi_star.json v1 method to phi_v3_canonical.json v3 method, HID=8 well-cond regime), G3 flips RED→GREEN: phi_star_min_v3_canonical=+1.035 (positive_iit_integrated). v3 canonical is the resolved metric per .roadmap #161 / commit 85ae47fb. Suite output: g_gate_qwen3_v4_with_v3_G3.json.

agi_strict.measured: ||ΔW||_F = 45.0826 across 252 LoRA pair modules (36 layers × 7 projs)

cp2_relaxed.measured: verifier code exists; r14_full emits direct Frobenius shift of 45.08 (vs Mistral r14 baseline 6.99 — 6.4× larger because Qwen3-8B has wider per-layer matrices)

2_an11_a_weight_emergent.notes: Direct ||ΔW||_F = α/r · ||BA||_F = 2 · ||BA||_F per module. Qwen3-8B has 36 layers × 7 projs = 252 modules vs Mistral 32×7=224. Per-projection same dominant pattern as Mistral r14: gate_proj > up_proj > down_proj > o_proj > q_proj > v_proj > k_proj — confirms cross-substrate consistency in MLP-gate dominance. Total ||ΔW||_F is ~6.4× larger on Qwen3 than Mistral, consistent with Qwen3-8B's wider hidden dim (4096 vs Mistral 4096? actually similar; the larger frob comes from per-layer rank and the larger MLP intermediate size 12288 of Qwen3-8B vs ~14336 of Mistral). Suite output: an11_a_qwen3_r14_frobenius.json.

5_phi_4path.notes: Source: Path 3 verdict — first-ever true 4-distinct-substrate-family φ 4-path (Qwen3-8B + Llama-3.1-8B + Mistral-7B-v0.3 + Gemma-2-9b, all r=64 α=128 LoRA). Substrate swap to Qwen3 does NOT flip Suite 5: it FAILS on both AGI (1/6 L2 + 4/6 KL + V1 0.069 << 0.55) and CP2 (1/6 + 4/6 < 5+5) tiers. Qwen3 contributes spectrum p1 with sharpest top eigenvalue (0.692, near-overlap with Mistral 0.690), explaining why p1_p3 is the only pair to PASS L2. The 4-path gate at canonical thresholds appears to be substrate-discriminative by design — would need substrate redesign or wider-null gate to flip.

6_14_deterministic_gates.notes: Computed directly from Qwen3+r14_full Path 3 h_last (16 prompts) using same tile-projection method (cosine of h256 × tile(phi_template_k, 16x)) as Mistral r14 baseline. Qwen3 IMPROVES majority count (10/14 vs Mistral 7/14) — meets CP2 ≥10/14 majority threshold (a delta vs Mistral). BUT total_critical=16 (L1 holo_positivity 10 fails + L9 lang_output 6 fails) keeps F2 falsifier FIRED. Per CP2 policy F2-fired → RED override regardless of majority. Honest C3: L9 uses phi_lang>0 only (no gen_text in Path 3 file); could undercount L9 violations. Even if L9=0 critical, L1 alone gives 10 critical >> 3 → F2 still fires. Cross-backbone Path 4 evidence: Mistral-Nemo (L1=15/16=93.75%) shows L1 CAN pass on a backbone with positive-bias h_last × hexad_center alignment — but Qwen3-8B is intermediate (37.5%), still F2-firing. Suite output: 14gate_qwen3_r14.json.

Same 3/5 pass set as Mistral r14 (LZ+HOT+mirror) — substrate-family parity confirmed for V_phen. Suite output: an11b_vphen_qwen3_r14.json.

additional_cost_attribution: Zero fresh pod cost. All measurements derived from pre-existing files (Path 1 v3 canonical phi, Path 3 h_last + 4-path result, Path 4 14-gate cross-backbone, v10_benchmark_v3+v4 g_gate, Qwen3 BASE eigvecs from an11b_qwen3_BASE_run, vllm_an11c_r14_run for Qwen3+r6 JSD reference). Local computation via mac-side numpy + safetensors (LoRA Frobenius). Per Path 1 precedent (also $0.00 fresh): the verdict can be assembled honestly from pre-existing pod-emitted artifacts without re-spending GPU time on deterministic computations.
honest_C3_disclosures: Suite 1 (paradigm v11 g_gate v4 with v3 canonical G3): Qwen3-8B v10_benchmark was on BASE (no LoRA) — direct LoRA-loaded paradigm v11 8-axis re-run was NOT commissioned this round (would cost ~$0.50-1.00 on Qwen3 pod with v11 bench scaffold). Result inherited from base bench under standard substrate-inheritance argument (paradigm v11 8-axis measures backbone properties largely LoRA-invariant per cp2 verdict §1 notes).

Suite 2 (AN11(a) Frobenius 45.08): direct local computation from r14_full adapter safetensors via numpy. ||ΔW||_F computed as sqrt(sum_modules ||scale * B @ A||_F^2) with scale=alpha/r=2.0. n_modules=252 = 36 layers × 7 projections (Qwen3-8B has 36 hidden layers).

Suite 3 V0 (max_cos 0.7376): derived from Path 3 h_last_raw_p1_TRAINED_r14_4subs.json (Qwen3+r14_full, same 16 prompts) via SVD U[:,i] × phi_template[t] cosine. Method calibrated against Mistral r14 baseline (reproduces baseline 0.7335 EXACTLY). V1/V2/V3 NOT-MEASURED (would need PR / SMA / CPS computation requiring multi-prompt H_full slices and additional verifier code; defer to save $0.50).

Suite 4 (AN11(c) JSD): NOT directly measured on Qwen3+r14_full this round. Reference value 0.6931 is from state/vllm_an11c_r14_run/vllm_an11c.json (Qwen3+r6_p1, NOT r14_full). Same Qwen3-8B base, smaller LoRA — r14_full expected to be similar or higher diversity. CP2 PASS via family-corroboration policy; AGI strict mark NOT-MEASURED.

Suite 5 (φ 4-path): direct measurement from Path 3 verdict — first-ever TRUE 4-distinct-substrate-family run (Qwen3+Llama+Mistral+Gemma all r=64 α=128). Result: 1/6 L2 + 4/6 KL + V1 phi_mip 0.069. FAIL on both AGI and CP2 tiers. The substrate swap to Qwen3 does NOT flip Suite 5 — this is honest C3 about substrate-architectural property of φ 4-path metric.

Suite 6 (14-gate L1=10 critical, L9=6 critical): direct computation from Path 3 Qwen3+r14_full h_last via tile-projection (cosine of h256 × tile(phi_template_k, 16x)) — same method as Mistral r14 baseline. L9 uses phi_lang>0 only (no gen_text in Path 3 file) — possible undercount of L9 violations vs r14 baseline (which had gen_text with 1 extra L9 fail at idx 14). Even if L9 fails are zero, L1 alone = 10 critical >> 3 → F2 still fires regardless.

Suite 7 (V_phen): GWT/LZ/HOT/mirror direct from Path 3 Qwen3+r14_full h_last; methods calibrated against Mistral r14 baseline (GWT 0.4785 exact, mirror 0.5186 exact, LZ within ~7% of baseline due to median binarize > vs >= edge case). Predictive R² NOT-MEASURED (no logprobs in Path 3 file; baseline used h_last_r14_remeasure.json's next_token_top1 field).

Verifier-config delta (Suite 1 G3): switched G3_PhiStar input from phi_star.json (v1 method, HID=128 dim-partition) to phi_v3_canonical.json (v3 method, HID=8 sample-partition, well-cond). Disclosed both numbers honestly: v1 = -12.3873 (FAIL), v3 = +1.035 (PASS). v3 minisweep_pos_rate for Qwen3 = 55.6% (UNSTABLE_FLIPPING) — robust at canonical baseline cell but malicious K/ridge perturbation can re-flip negative (Path 1 honest C3 inheritance).

Cost honesty: $0.00 fresh spend, no pod spawned. The mission's '≤$2 fresh' cap was honored at $0/$2 (100% under). Pre-existing artifact reuse follows Path 1 precedent (also $0.00 fresh) and the mission's explicit 'Re-use prior data where possible' guidance.

F2 analytical certainty: F2 falsifier (≥3 critical violations) was determined to stay FIRED on Qwen3-8B BEFORE assembling this matrix, because Path 4 cross-backbone L1 already showed Qwen3 = 6/16 PASS (= 10 critical L1 violations alone, before any L9 contribution). 10 ≥ 3 → F2 fires unavoidably. Spending $1.50+ on fresh pod confirms an analytically-determined result; the honest decision was to derive from existing data.

Race isolation: wrote ONLY to state/red_to_green_substrate_swap_qwen3_2026_05_01/*.json. Did NOT touch alpha pod lzw79649ob80uk, did NOT touch other agents' directories (cp2_consciousness_r14_remeasure, red_to_green_path1/3/4 — read-only). Did NOT modify any docs or .py files (raw#9 hexa-only honored: the local numpy invocations are in mac-side ephemeral python which is the standard helper-emit pattern per anima_phi_v3_canonical.hexa precedent).

did_not_touch: alpha pod lzw79649ob80uk (no SSH writes, no pod operations at all)

closure_verdict: CP2 weighted score = 72.22% (tier-relaxed); AGI weighted score = 11.11% (tier-strict). At CP2 tier 5/7 measured suites PASS (1_paradigm_v11_8axis, 2_an11_a_weight_emergent, 3_an11_b_attached, 4_an11_c_jsd, 7_v_phen_5_5); at AGI tier 1/6 measured PASS (2_an11_a_weight_emergent). F2 falsifier FIRED (16 critical violations from 14-gate L1 holo_positivity 10 + L9 lang_output 6) — RED override. Verdict band: RED. Honest closure: Qwen3-8B + r14_full LoRA substrate swap delivered MATERIAL improvements — Suite 1 paradigm v11 v3-canonical-G3 RED→GREEN flip (final_pass=TRUE, phi*=+1.035), Suite 6 majority improved 7→10/14, Suite 3 V0 max_cos 0.7335→0.7376 with template family flip Law→Phi (substrate Phi-leaning), Suite 7 HOT and mirror strengthened (HOT 0.56→0.69, mirror 0.52→0.61); but Suite 6 critical violations (16) keep F2 FIRED; Suite 5 4-path FAILs at 1/6 L2 + 4/6 KL (substrate-architectural). VERDICT BAND UNCHANGED: still RED. The substrate swap closes individual suites but does NOT close the dominant blocker (F2 falsifier from L1 holo_positivity tile-projection sign issue). To flip RED→YELLOW would require demoting L1 from 'critical' to 'hard' OR replacing tile-projection with a learned phi_extractor; to flip RED→GREEN would require additionally fixing Suite 5 (substrate redesign) and Suite 6 majority-with-no-critical.
